# btpservice_cicd_jobs (Data Source)

Lists all jobs in the SAP BTP CI/CD service.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "btpservice_cicd_jobs" "all" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the data source.
- `values` (Attributes List) The list of jobs. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values))

<a id="nestedatt--values"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether the job is active.
- `branch` (String) Branch pattern the job is executed for.
- `build_retention_days` (Number) Number of days build artifacts are retained.
- `description` (String) Human-readable description of the job.
- `id` (String) Unique identifier of the job.
- `max_builds_to_keep` (Number) Maximum number of builds retained for this job.
- `name` (String) Name of the job.
- `notification_configuration` (Attributes) Notification settings for the job. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values--notification_configuration))
- `pipeline` (String) Pipeline type of the job (e.g. `cf-env`, `cpi`).
- `pipeline_parameters` (String) Pipeline parameters serialised as a canonical YAML string.
- `pipeline_version` (String) Version of the pipeline type.
- `repository_id` (String) ID of the source repository used by the job.

<a id="nestedatt--values--notification_configuration"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values.notification_configuration`

Read-Only:

- `ans` (Attributes) SAP Alert Notification Service (ANS) settings. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--values--notification_configuration--ans))

<a id="nestedatt--values--notification_configuration--ans"></a>
### Nested Schema for `values.notification_configuration.ans`

Read-Only:

- `active` (Boolean) Whether ANS notifications are active.
- `credential_id` (String) ID of the ANS credential to use.
- `custom_tag` (String) Optional custom tag added to ANS notifications.
